name: housing_municipal_bond_covenant_southport_lib_eq
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Housing, the situation tagged internally around housing municipal bond covenant southport lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Keisha Berg
agents.identity: I am Keisha Berg, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Housing. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Park
agents.identity: I am Sana Park, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Housing. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Keisha Berg must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Keisha Berg do?
